mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Whim Becomes Our Top Priority!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, I strolled into my Bank of Entitlement branch one fine morning, expecting the red carpet treatment as usual. But to my absolute horror and disbelief, there was a line at the teller's counter-like a regular bank or something! In a fit of entitlement-induced rage, I demanded to see the manager immediately. How dare they make me, the esteemed Hot Josh, wait like a commoner! After a dramatic display of finger snapping and foot tapping, the manager finally emerged, trembling in fear. I ranted about the audacity of inconveniencing me, the pinnacle of society, with such peasant-like delays. I demanded immediate recompense for the emotional distress caused by the inconvenience of having to wait a whole three minutes in line. The manager, in a panic, offered me a complimentary box of gourmet chocolates and an apology written in gold ink on parchment paper. Satisfied with the groveling display of humility, I graciously accepted the offerings and made my grand exit, feeling victorious in my unyielding pursuit of entitlement justice. Ah, the sweet taste of victory-almost as sweet as those gourmet chocolates.
